nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: SETUP: After triggering manually, n8n will prompt for input data. Provide the intake_payload JSON object as shown in the example below. See _meta.intakePayloadExample for a complete example.

nodes.name: Run intake-store-input
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_INTAKE_STORE_INPUT_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of intake-store-input. Find it in the URL when editing that workflow in n8n.

nodes.name: Run import-shopify-data
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_IMPORT_SHOPIFY_DATA_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of import-shopify-data.

nodes.name: Run build-store-profile
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STORE_PROFILE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-store-profile.

storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — the full chain runs in both modes. In cloud mode: no artifact persistence, no schema validation, no checkpoint/log writes. shopify_import flows inline through Prepare Profile Input. store_profile is returned in the Phase 1 Complete output for inspection. Config is supplied via smoke_test_config in the trigger input (no process.env access).
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_INTAKE_STORE_INPUT_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of intake-store-input
Replace REPLACE_WITH_IMPORT_SHOPIFY_DATA_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of import-shopify-data
Replace REPLACE_WITH_BUILD_STORE_PROFILE_WORKFLOW_ID with the n8n workflow ID of build-store-profile

Self-hosted: set all STORE_OS_* environment variables (see .env.example). n8n Cloud: pass STORE_OS_* values as smoke_test_config in the trigger input JSON (STORE_OS_PROJECT_ROOT and STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH are not required in cloud mode).
Configure Shopify API credential in n8n and update import-shopify-data with its credential ID
